items.definition_en: A mother is a woman who has a child.
items.example_en: My mother makes the best cookies.

items.definition_en: A father is a man who has a child.
items.example_en: His father works at a bank.

items.definition_en: A brother is a boy or man who has the same parents as you.
items.example_en: My brother plays soccer every weekend.

items.definition_en: A sister is a girl or woman who has the same parents as you.
items.example_en: Her sister is older than her.

items.definition_en: A grandmother is your mother's or father's mother.
items.example_en: My grandmother tells funny stories.

items.definition_en: A grandfather is your mother's or father's father.
items.example_en: Her grandfather lives in the village.

items.definition_en: An aunt is your parent's sister.
items.example_en: His aunt visits them every summer.

items.definition_en: An uncle is your parent's brother.
items.example_en: My uncle has a big dog.

items.definition_en: A cousin is the child of your aunt or uncle.
items.example_en: My cousin lives in another city.

items.definition_en: A son is a male child of a parent.
items.example_en: Their son goes to primary school.

items.definition_en: A daughter is a female child of a parent.
items.example_en: Her daughter likes to draw pictures.

items.definition_en: A wife is a woman who is married.
items.example_en: His wife works at the hospital.

items.definition_en: A husband is a man who is married.
items.example_en: My husband is learning Spanish.

items.definition_en: A parent is a mother or father.
items.example_en: Every parent wants the best for their child.

items.definition_en: A child is a young person who is not an adult.
items.example_en: The child is playing in the park.

items.definition_en: A twin is one of two children born at the same time to the same mother.
items.example_en: She has a twin who looks just like her.

items.definition_en: A stepfather is a man who is married to your mother but is not your real father.
items.example_en: My stepfather taught me to ride a bike.

items.definition_en: A stepmother is a woman who is married to your father but is not your real mother.
items.example_en: Her stepmother gave her a nice birthday gift.

items.definition_en: A nephew is the son of your brother or sister.
items.example_en: Their nephew is coming to visit tomorrow.

items.definition_en: A niece is the daughter of your brother or sister.
items.example_en: My niece loves to paint pictures.
